content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the committed 9ni.6.2 implementation (working tree was clean), read the prompt-generation and CLI code paths, and ran `cargo test` successfully. I found one correctness gap: bead description parsing does not recognize level-1 markdown headings for `Non-goals` / `Acceptance Criteria`, so some valid descriptions would render incorrect prompt scope.

## Amendments

1. Handle level-1 markdown headings when extracting bead-local `Non-goals` and `Acceptance Criteria` from descriptions. In `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:501-537` and `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:694-751`, `markdown_heading_title()` ignores `# ...` headings (`hash_count < 2`), so a valid bead description like `# Non-goals` / `# Acceptance Criteria` is left inside `Must-Do Scope` instead of being extracted into the canonical sections. That makes `prompt.md` misstate scope and can drop acceptance criteria entirely on otherwise normal markdown input. Update the parser to recognize level-1 through level-6 headings consistently and add a regression test covering `# Non-goals` and `# Acceptance Criteria`.
   Rationale: This is a correctness bug in prompt generation: common markdown heading syntax produces the wrong scope boundary and can omit the bead's acceptance criteria from the rendered prompt.
